features: Revitalising deodorant spray with aromatic woody fragrance
Provides an intense fragrance experience that lasts up to 24 hours
Fresh kick thanks to Cypriot top note and floral fruity chords
A dynamic and masculine fragrance that sprays with pulsating energy
Top notes: grapefruit, mandarin, cedarwood and mint; middle notes: floral notes, apple, mango; base notes: sandalwood, patchouli, tonka bean, ambergris
description: A dynamic and masculine fragrance that sprays with pulsating energy. The aromatic, fresh adidas Dynamic Pulse Deodorant Spray is ideal for the active man who shies no challenges. The fragrance opens with a Cypriot fresh top note of grapefruit, mandarin, cedar wood and mint. The heart notes combine floral notes with the fruity scent of apple and mango. The fragrance is rounded off with sensual chords of sandalwood, patchouli and tonka bean. adidas Dynamic Pulse gives an extraordinary feeling of freshness and energy to face every challenge of everyday life - ideal for active men.
